results.georeferenceProtocol: Compared gazetteer coordinates with report map
results.georeferenceRemarks: Figure 3.3 on page 66 in the Final report (Daborn 1991) is a map of the sampling area and it shows the location of the fish trap and the barge. This exact location was not georeferenced. The location of the barge, referenced in the text of the report was used as the nominal location for this dataset.

results.verbatimLocality: northeast of project barge, located at 45.127306N, -64.363117W, on mudflat at Starrs Point

results.associatedReferences: Daborn, Graham R. (1991). Littoral Investigation of Sediment Properties Minas Basin, 1989 Final Report. ACER. Publication No. 17. Acadia University. Wolfville, Nova Scotia.
results.datasetName: ACER: Benthic fish recorded as part of the 1989 Littoral Investigation of Sediment Properties project in the Minas Basin
results.georeferenceProtocol: Compared gazetteer coordinates with report map
results.georeferenceRemarks: Figure 3.3 on page 66 in the Final report (Daborn 1991) is a map of the sampling area and it shows the location of the fish trap and the barge. This exact location was not georeferenced. The location of the barge, referenced in the text of the report was used as the nominal location for this dataset.
